overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character jogging through a dense forest trail. The environment features tall pine trees, rock formations, and transitions from an enclosed wooded path to an open overlook with a traditional stone lantern. The lighting suggests an approaching storm or dusk with dark overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with granite outcroppings

agents.ego_description: samurai character jogging steadily along the forest path between tall pines

entered.detail: towering evergreen trees forming a dense canopy over the trail
granite boulders and rock walls lining the left side of the path
narrow winding trail of compacted earth through the forest
dense ferns and shrubs flanking both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The samurai character jogs along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest. Large granite outcroppings line the left side of the path while tall trees create a canopy overhead. The overcast sky casts a cool, diffused light through the branches.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wooden plank section

events.description: a small fox appears on the path ahead and stands facing the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path, approaching and passing a small fox

notable_agents.action: small fox standing on the path, watching the character approach before moving aside

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks embedded in the dirt path creating a small stepped section

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest trail, the rock formations give way to denser undergrowth. At approximately 40 seconds, a small fox appears in the center of the path, pausing to observe the approaching character before the samurai passes by. The terrain briefly features wooden plank steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest overlook with traditional stone lantern

events.description: path opens to reveal wide vista of distant forest and mountains under stormy sky

agents.ego_description: jogging along the widening path toward an overlook with a stone lantern

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern (tōrō) on a pedestal beside the path
expansive view of forested hills and valleys fading into the misty distance

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to a wider vista as the path curves gently to the right. A traditional Japanese stone lantern appears on the right side of the trail, marking an overlook point. The view expands to reveal distant forested hills under the dark, stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, enclosed pine forest that gradually opens into a wide mountain overlook. It begins with a samurai jogging along a narrow dirt trail flanked by large granite outcroppings under a cool, diffused overcast sky. As the path continues, the rock formations transition into denser undergrowth and wooden plank steps, where a small fox pauses in the center of the trail before the character passes by. The scene then expands as the forest thins and the path curves gently to the right, revealing a traditional Japanese stone lantern. Finally, the view opens completely to reveal distant forested hills beneath a dark, stormy sky.
